description: Test Add_NullTeam_ThrowsArgumentNullException uses a bare .Throw<ArgumentNullException>() assertion without checking the parameter name. If the implementation ever accidentally throws on a different null check, the test still passes. More importantly, the same pattern repeats at line 315 for Update_NullTeam_ThrowsArgumentNullException. Both should verify the parameter name via .WithParameterName("team") to confirm the right argument was checked.
suggestedFix: Add .WithParameterName("team") to the FluentAssertions Throw chain: act.Should().Throw<ArgumentNullException>().WithParameterName("team");
